summary.endpoint: Every exact HKCanCor token matching preceding POS v, v1, or xv + 咗 + following POS r is inventoried and must be accounted for in the R2 decision ledger.

query.selectionUnit: token adjacency within one HKCanCor utterance

stableIdPolicy.reason: The 27 exact-佢 candidates were reviewed in R1. Their existing candidate IDs remain unchanged inside this superseding R2 ledger.

summary.interpretationWarning: The POS tags and V-咗-r adjacency define a high-recall comparison slice only. Expert context review must distinguish an overt object from a following clause subject, possessive-NP onset, repair, or other analysis. Counts do not establish productivity or readiness.
